results.rendered_html:
dākṣāyaṇī [dakṣasyāpatyaṃ strī iñi phakṅīp]
1 Any one of the 27 lunar mansions (they being mythologically regarded as so many daughters of Dakṣa).
2 N. of Diti, wife of Kaśyapa and mother of the demons.
3 N. of Pārvatī.
4 The lunar constellation called Revatī.
5 N. of Kadru or Vinatā.
6 N. of Aditi, mother of the gods.
7 The Dantī plant.
Comp.
— patiḥ
1 an epithet of Śiva.
2 the moon.
— putraḥ a god.
